_comment: Rolepod Antigravity CLI (agy) plugin manifest. Schema verified against agy 1.0.13 installed plugins (~/.gemini/config/plugins/*/plugin.json) on 2026-06-30: name required (^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$), version/description/license/keywords optional. Installed via `agy plugin install <dir>` into ~/.gemini/config/plugins/rolepod/. Bundles skills/ + agents + hooks.json (at the plugin root) + hooks/ scripts. The always-on core (AGENTS.md) is NOT a plugin component — it installs to the agy customization root.
name: rolepod
description: 16-agent dev team workflow with gates, simplicity rules, and verify-first discipline. Antigravity CLI (agy) plugin.
